\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4289 introduces Displacement Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$Y_{\ell m}^{(\hat{\mathbf{n}})}=\sum_{m'=-\ell}^{\ell} D^{\ell}_{m m'}(R)Y_{\ell m'}$
\]
